Khan AAG with M٢. Muhamnad Aurangzaib Muhammad Akram Shahid, DEO(MEE), Muzaffargarh order, intend to decide this Through this single connected Inatters bearing WP Nos petition alongwith 11045, 11044, 11145, 11144, 11053, 11146 0f 2017 COIIIlOn question of law and facts is involved The brief facts of these petitions are that respondent Nos. and 2 advertised in October November 2016 for appointment various pOStS educators ESE(Science Math ) SESE (English), SESE(Urdu), SESE(Math), SESE(Science) SESE( Arabic ), etc The petitioners having the requisite qualification applied for posts of ESE(Science Math) The respondent No 1, after scrutinizing the academic records of the petitioners 000٢/ 4n0 ٠ر٠ر' ٠٠ Inviled IlicI I anpear in Ihie NIS exall8 who succeeded ،١؛،١ ٨،،١١١ ١١٠ ١١ز 1ic ١i١٨٠ ٢ lآا55نا candidates wre invit٧ Iir training by the respondents by excluding the names oFihu pctitioncrs. The pctitioners approached the respondents who informed them that their names have been removed Ihe subsequent merit Iist prepared by the respondents the basis of impugned notification dated 24,07.2017. response the notice issued this Court parawise comments were filed by the respondents stating therein that Government of the Punjab, School Education Department vide letter No SO(SEiv)U2-SU2OI5 dated 09.09.2016 approved the academic and professional qualification criteria for recruitment of the existing posts of Educators and for the post of ESE, candidate should lcast BABSc 2nd Division recognized university whereas the petitioners in these petitions hold 3' Divisions hence arا not entitled to appointment Learned counsel for the petitioners have argued that the petitioners Wا٢ eligible for appointments the respective posts and Were rightly recommended by the Recruitment Cummiuce; that it is settled law that nobody can be penalized by inaction of the public functionaries; Io١n from ٠ ٠ر٦ "٠ ،٠١١١١« ١ ١٠، ١٨١٠ ١١،ؤ١٨ /300/_01.3 001100/1/.8 UJiscriminai0n. Converscly, learned AAG supports the taken by the respondents by referring to common observations Inade by Third Validation (TPV) of Recruitment of Educators and argues that candidate having graduation degree with 3 Division and Master Degree with 2"d Division shall disqualified and as all the petitioners hold 3 Division graduation degree therefore, tne respondents have rightly disqualified them Heard Record perused The recruitment process for ٤١٨ appointment of Educators commenced under I٨٤ Recruitment Policy 2016/2017 in October November 2016 in which tne petitioners applied for different posts of ESE including ESE (Sci Math) Initial their candidature WaS processed further but subsequently they were dropped from the said The reason for rejection of the candidature of the petitioners is that they have obtained 3r division in uction P3rty prOc55,
